name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-socratic-tutor
title: Socratic Tutor Declarative Agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot
shortDescription: A declarative agent that teaches by asking questions, using the Socratic method to guide learners to discover knowledge.
longDescription: Socratic Tutor is an instruction-only declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that teaches by asking instead of telling. It uses the Socratic method - clarifying questions, probing assumptions, asking for evidence, exploring alternative viewpoints, examining implications, and meta-questioning - to guide learners to discover concepts on their own and develop critical-thinking skills across programming, academic, and professional topics. This sample was converted from the socratic-tutor agent instruction in the pnp/copilot-prompts repository.
